mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.question_id, r.first_mistake_time, r.last_mistake_time, r.mistake_count, r.status, r.mastered_time, r.created_at, r.updated_at, q.title AS question_title, q.category, q.difficulty FROM mistake_record r INNER JOIN question q ON r.question_id = q.id AND q.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.question_id, r.first_mistake_time, r.last_mistake_time, r.mistake_count, r.status, r.mastered_time, r.created_at, r.updated_at, q.title AS question_title, q.category, q.difficulty FROM mistake_record r INNER JOIN question q ON r.question_id = q.id AND q.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mistake_record (user_id, question_id, first_mistake_time, last_mistake_time, mistake_count, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{firstMistakeTime}, #{lastMistakeTime}, #{mistakeCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE mistake_record SET mistake_count = mistake_count + 1, last_mistake_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingReview, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mastered FROM mistake_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT q.category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mistake_record r INNER JOIN question q ON r.question_id = q.id AND q.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY q.category ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT q.category, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS count FROM mistake_record r INNER JOIN question q ON r.question_id = q.id AND q.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN mistake_answer_detail d ON r.id = d.mistake_id INNER JOIN interview_session s ON d.interview_id = s.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND s.position = #{position} GROUP BY q.category ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT t.name AS tag_name, COUNT(*) AS wrong_count, MAX(q.title) AS sample_question FROM mistake_record mr JOIN question q ON mr.question_id = q.id AND q.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN question_tag_rel qtr ON q.id = qtr.question_id LEFT JOIN tag t ON qtr.tag_id = t.id WHERE mr.user_id = #{userId} AND mr.status = 0 GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY wrong_count DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT id, mistake_id, interview_id, user_answer, ai_comment, category, created_at FROM mistake_answer_detail WHERE mistake_id = #{mistakeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mistake_answer_detail (mistake_id, interview_id, user_answer, ai_comment, category) VALUES (#{mistakeId}, #{interviewId}, #{userAnswer}, #{aiComment}, #{category})
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id AS mistakeRecordId, r.question_id AS id, q.title, q.content, q.answer, q.difficulty, q.category, r.mistake_count AS mistakeCount FROM mistake_record r INNER JOIN question q ON r.question_id = q.id AND q.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.id IN
#{id}
